original_snippet_context: Report on large exchange transactions and falling exchange rates.
relevant_quote: O mercado abriu a taxa de 16 3/4, caindo sempre até 15 3/4 e fechando a 15 13/16 e 15 7/8. sem letras.
justification: This excerpt describes market activity and exchange rate fluctuations without expressing any opinion on the Caixa de Conversão or its ideal rate, making it purely factual.
